# playback

`github.com/lnorton89/golc/internal/playback`

Package playback implements GOLC's real-time deterministic playback
engine (CONTEXT SCEN-06/SCEN-09, D-05..D-08): Engine publishes its
active frame and plan exclusively through atomic.Pointer, so every
UI/persistence/scripts/API/LLM adapter crosses the tick loop boundary
with a non-blocking Load/Store and can never block or backpressure live
output. An edit stages as a pendingPlan and adopts only at the next
bar-boundary crossing, detected by comparing integer BarIndex values
rather than a BeatFraction equality check, so a rejected or in-flight
edit never blanks or interrupts what is already playing.
